Kano Hideyori

Farming and Herding Buffalo in Summer
by Kano Hideyori
Japan, Muromachi period (1392–1573) to Momoyama period (1573–1615) · mid- to late 1500s · hanging scroll; ink and light color on paper
←Pieter van der Heyden Muhammad Rizavi Hindi→
